channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 22 May: Harare overcast · high 21° / low 10°
item.description: Harare: high 21°, low 10° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 23°, low 10° (overcast) · Mutare: high 21°, low 13° (light drizzle) · Gweru: high 22°, low 10° (overcast) · Masvingo: high 22°, low 13° (overcast) · Victoria Falls: high 26°, low 14° (clear sky) Tsumo yezuva: Kugarira nhaka kuona bvute. (To inherit is to see the dust settle.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
